title: CEDT Adapter
description: Schema for a single Cancer Ecology Digital Twin (CEDT) adapter record, as defined in data/adapters/cedt_mappings.json. Each adapter binds a module's actual output ports (from Phase-2 typed ports) to twin state variables in twin_state_schema.json.

source_module.description: Module ID that this adapter binds to (e.g. 'EG3.MOD.BIOTRANS.FLUX.v1').

twin_layer.description: Primary CEDT layer targeted by this adapter.

description.description: Narrative description of what this adapter does and any honest limitations.

eg3_output_port.description: Name of the source module output port (must match a real output_port in the module JSON).

eg3_dtype.description: Data type of the source port (from Phase-2 typed port definitions, e.g. 'score:activation').

twin_variable.description: Target CEDT twin state variable name (must exist in twin_state_schema.json).

twin_layer.description: CEDT layer of the target variable.

transform.description: Transformation applied from port to twin variable.

unit.description: Unit of the mapped value, or null if categorical.

provenance_note.description: Mandatory provenance note documenting the source of the value and any null conditions. Must not fabricate biology.
